description: sc25 2/6. L1: 3 diamond spell casts (teleport cycles destinations). L2: L-shape teleport + walk UP. L3+: background sprite IS the maze (collidable). Vertical line spell = size change. Need precise path planning with budget constraints.

sc25 deep analysis. Spell mapping CORRECTED: L-shape=TELEPORT, diamond=SIZE_CHANGE, vertical=FIREBALL. Background sprite (dtfljwuit-4) IS the maze — pixel transparency = passable. Fireball must hit edusagitv switch (not door directly) to remove ALL doors. Player must be same row/col as target. Scale 2=4x4 collision 4px step, scale 1=2x2 collision 2px step. SDK level transitions may not reset rendered position to level definition — need to track actual position. L3 needs: align y with edusagitv(55,22), face RIGHT, fireball, navigate through cleared corridor to exit(22,37). Budget=50 actions per level.

sc25 4/6 solved. L5-L6 need multi-spell combos: teleport between isolated corridors, shrink to navigate narrow passages, fireball switches to remove doors. Action leak between levels was a critical bug. Pixel-level fireball paths matter — only specific y values have clear line-of-sight through 1px gaps in walls.

sc25 5/6. L5 solved with triple spell combo: shrink→teleport→fireball#1(UP)→fireball#2(LEFT, secondary switch)→grow→teleport→shrink→walk to exit. L6 has isolated corridors needing precise teleport cycling + dual fireball alignment. Close but not yet complete.

VERIFIED L1-L5 action sequences. CRITICAL: spell click coords from game source: DIAMOND=(30,50),(25,55),(35,55),(30,60); LSHAPE=(25,50),(30,50),(30,55); VLINE=(30,50),(30,55),(30,60). LSHAPE is 3 clicks not 4. First action on L1 consumed by 22-frame intro. Direction matters for fireball - face the target direction BEFORE casting VLINE.
L1 VERIFIED: RIGHT(intro) + DIAMOND(4) + LEFT x12. Player shrinks s2->s1, walks left to exit. Budget=50, uses ~17.
L2 VERIFIED: RIGHT(intro) + LSHAPE(3) + UP x2. Teleport to (31,19), walk UP to exit. Budget=25, uses ~6.
L3 VERIFIED: RIGHT(face RIGHT) + VLINE(3) + LEFT x3 + DOWN x4 + LEFT x3. Face RIGHT first (fireball direction matters!), fireball hits switch at (55,22), then navigate LEFT+DOWN to exit. Budget=50.

L4 VERIFIED: DIAMOND(4,shrink) + DOWN x5 + LEFT x4 + VLINE(3,fireball LEFT at switch) + DIAMOND(4,grow) + DOWN x2 + RIGHT x6. Fire from x=27 at y=29 - fireball LEFT travels through passable corridor to hit switch at (7,28). Budget=35, uses ~28.

L5 VERIFIED: DIAMOND(4,shrink) + LSHAPE(3,tp to 29,39) + LEFT x7(to x=15) + UP x12(to y=15) + VLINE(3,fireball UP at primary 15,11) + DOWN x14(to y=43) + LEFT x1(face LEFT) + VLINE(3,fireball LEFT at secondary 3,43) + DIAMOND(4,grow) + LSHAPE(3,tp to 51,35) + UP x6. Budget=65, uses ~60.

L6 VERIFIED: DIAMOND(4,shrink) + LSHAPE(3,tp 13,41) + RIGHT x2 + UP x3 + VLINE(3,fireball UP primary 17,33) + DIAMOND(4,grow) + LSHAPE(3,tp 53,37) + LEFT x3 at s2 + VLINE(3,fireball LEFT secondary 37,37) + LSHAPE(3,tp 29,33) + DIAMOND(4,shrink) + UP x2 + RIGHT x2 + UP x9. Budget=60, used=48.
sc25 6/6 COMPLETE. All levels verified. Total baseline=216.
